title: I Still Dream of Taking First!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho behind us, we'll be training
even harder than ever in preparation for the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew! Ah...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Man, this is tough!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My form really fell apart in the second half. I
guess I still don't have enough stamina.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Can we do more training to increase my stamina?
I need to do even more running on my own too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes out her notebook, and I see how
crammed her personal training routine is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah! No, no, hehe. I mean this is what everyone's
notebook looks like. It just means I need to work
even harder.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is a once-in-a-lifetime race. I
need to be the absolute best I can be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as we're training, many reporters gather
nearby to interview Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon's been getting interviewed a lot lately.
With how good she's getting, I guess that
shouldn't be surprising.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I have to get something good out of Bourbon
today no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: ...I really hope I can write a good article. But I'm sure this time will be a bust too... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what's eating him... I guess being a
reporter is hard too.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh really?! So there's an Umamusume you're
watching out for in the Japanese Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. She's usually more of the quiet and
modest type, but I caught a glimpse of her
strength at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've watched her train since then as well, and I've
confirmed that she's rapidly improving.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In conclusion, I've deemed her a formidable
opponent for the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Um... so, next, I'd like to
ask—

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Who exactly is it you're talking
about?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No way! So Bourbon's had her eye on Rice Shower
too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right. I interviewed Rice the other day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes. I ran into her while I was out on a walk...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Rice! What a coincidence! I'm looking forward
to running with you in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: M-me too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second. Is that a hole in the sole of your
shoe? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right! Maybe I ran too much. I should
get new ones.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You've been running so much your shoes are
falling apart?! You must seriously be working
hard!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, when I raced you at the
Satsuki Sho, I could tell how hard you've been
working! You ran really well too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
D-do you think so? I still haven't caught up yet,
though...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Caught up to... who? Oh, do you mean Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?! How did you know?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, I actually saw you in the runners' tunnel at
the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you saw that? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I didn't mean to spy on you! But you were
so passionate, it made me want to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I totally get why you look up to Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The crowd just lights up when she runs! She's so
cool!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sh-she really is!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She's so strong and cool and she makes everyone
smile when they see her. She really is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's why... someday... I want to be just like her...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I hope I can do it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I feel like I got a really good scoop today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They're both amazing! Bourbon for being able to
inspire everyone like that, and Rice for working
so hard to improve herself because of Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: U-um, excuse me. Could I—

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Would you mind telling me a little
more about that?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Oh, s-sure!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Who would've thought she felt that?! People are
definitely going to want to read about this!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it might be a good idea to ask a specialist to
predict which of them is going to win.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm. Which of... them?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
But the brass said we don't have to bother with
anyone else. It's Mihono Bourbon that everyone
wants to read about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They seem to be too caught up in their work to
realize that the Umamusume right in front of them
is also running in the Japanese Derby.
choice_data_list: (As her trainer, I can't just sit here quietly...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a minute!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I understand that the remarkable relationship
between Bourbon and Rice might cast a shadow
over the other runners!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And I get that Bourbon is the one in demand right
now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, that doesn't mean one of the
other racers can't win.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I-I-I'm so sorry! I didn't realize!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! I totally get it! I mean, there's nothing
special about me at all! I'm ordinary! I'm nobody!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But... But even so... I believe I have a chance of
winning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm the same as everyone else. If it's not
first place, I don't need it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the same gentle air about her as always,
but there is unmistakable passion in her words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours later, we spot the reporter with the
round glasses looking moved.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. You don't have to be special...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to be special... You just have to want to
win...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby is almost here.
